verifier_values.criteria: States the average final grade of students with no special designation as 73 in the standard level (acceptable range 72 to 74)
verifier_values.negative_criteria: States the average final grade of students with no special designation as a value other than 73 in the standard level.

verifier_values.criteria: States the average final grade of students with no special designation as 87 in the advanced level (acceptable range 86 to 88)
verifier_values.negative_criteria: States the final grade of students with no special designation as a value other than 87 in the advanced level.

verifier_values.criteria: States the average final grade of students with 504 plans as 89 in the advanced level (acceptable range 88 to 90)
verifier_values.negative_criteria: States the average final grade of students with 504 plans as a value other than 90 in the advanced level.

verifier_values.criteria: States the average final grade of students with 504 plans as 78 in the standard level (acceptable range 77 to 79)
verifier_values.negative_criteria: States the average final grade of students with 504 plans as a value other than 78 in the standard level.

verifier_values.criteria: States the average final grade of students with IEPs as 68 in the standard level (acceptable range 67 to 69)
verifier_values.negative_criteria: States the average final grade of students with IEPs as a value other than 68 in the standard level.

verifier_values.criteria: States the average final grade of students with IEPs as 81 in the advanced level (acceptable range 80 to 82)
verifier_values.negative_criteria: States the average final grade of students with IEPs as a value other than 82 in the advanced level.

verifier_values.criteria: States the average final grade of students who are ELLs as 88 in the advanced level (acceptable range 87 to 89)
verifier_values.negative_criteria: States the average final grade of students who are ELLs as a value other than 88 in the advanced level.

verifier_values.criteria: States the average final grade of students who are ELLs as 73 in the standard level (acceptable range 72 to 74)
verifier_values.negative_criteria: States the average final grade of students who are ELLs as a value other than 74 in the standard level.

verifier_values.criteria: States that students with 504 plans have higher final grades than students with no special designation in both levels
verifier_values.negative_criteria: States that students with 504 plans have lower final grades than students with no special designation in both levels.

verifier_values.criteria: States that students with IEPs have lower final grades than students with no special designation in both levels
verifier_values.negative_criteria: States that students with IEPs have higher final grades than students with no special designation in both levels.
